name: I AM PILL
short_description: I AM PILL: A neon-drenched arcade challenge, testing dexterity and resolve. Master push-pull mechanics through increasingly difficult levels. Experience intense visuals, unforgiving gameplay, and themes of addiction and triumph in this psychedelic, precision-based journey. Rage, reset, conquer.
detailed_description: I AM PILL is a neon arcade skill based rage game. Play your way through many levels of crushing difficulty and varying mechanics. Enjoy difficult, but fair gameplay with unforgiving precision and timed accuracy. Start simple with the early levels and become a pro at the end of the game. Restart hundreds of times and finally complete that nearly impossible level. Stay focused on the scores you care about and enjoy the game how you wish. Go through without resetting, with as much flow as possible, in the least amount of time, or with the fewest clicks. Create your own challenge inside the gameplay loop! Persevere the game's brutal mockery all the while you explore the themes of addiction and triumph.
